questions.question: Why store the tokenized corpus in a resizable, chunked HDF5 dataset rather than JSONL?
options: HDF5 offers chunked, integer-only, memory-mapped reads with O(1) random access; JSONL forces the parser onto every hot-path read
questions.explanation: The dataloader wants a flat token stream with addressable slices; HDF5 supplies that natively.
questions.question_zh: 为什么把分词后的语料存成可调整大小的、分块的 HDF5 数据集,而不是 JSONL?
options_zh: HDF5 提供分块、纯整数、内存映射且 O(1) 随机访问的读取; JSONL 把 parser 放进每次热路径读取
questions.explanation_zh: Dataloader 想要平坦的 token 流和可寻址切片; HDF5 原生提供。

questions.question: What is the right rule for sizing the HDF5 chunk vs the trainer's window_size?
options: Set chunk to a multiple of window_size so each sample lands inside one or two chunks and reads stay page-cache aligned
Pick chunk equal to the document length
Pick the largest chunk that fits in RAM
questions.explanation: Mismatched chunks halve throughput because every sample straddles two chunks instead of one.
questions.question_zh: HDF5 chunk 与 trainer 的 window_size 应该按什么规则配?
options_zh: 把 chunk 设为 window_size 的倍数,使每个样本落在 1 或 2 个 chunk 内,读对页缓存对齐
把 chunk 设成文档长度
选能放进 RAM 的最大 chunk
questions.explanation_zh: Chunk 不匹配会让吞吐减半,因为每个样本都跨两个 chunk 而不是落在一个里。

questions.question: Why is token_count stored as an HDF5 attribute and not implied from dataset shape?
options: The trailing chunk may be partially full; without the explicit attribute the reader walks past the real end into zero-padded tokens and the model learns to predict zero
questions.explanation: The chunked layout sometimes leaves trailing slots; the attribute carries the truth.
questions.question_zh: 为什么 token_count 存成 HDF5 attribute,而不是从数据集 shape 推断?
options_zh: 尾部 chunk 可能未填满; 没有显式 attribute,reader 会越过真实结尾,读到 0 padding 的 token,模型就学会预测 0
questions.explanation_zh: Chunked 布局有时尾槽未满; attribute 携带真值。

questions.question: What does the writer accomplish by buffering tokens to chunk_size before each resize?
options: Writes are contiguous and chunk-aligned, avoiding the fragmentation that follows one-token-at-a-time resizes
questions.explanation: Buffer-then-extend at chunk size is the only way to keep HDF5 chunks contiguous on disk.
questions.question_zh: writer 在每次 resize 前把 token 缓冲到 chunk_size,达到了什么效果?
options_zh: 节省几个 CPU 周期
写入是连续且按 chunk 对齐的,避免逐 token resize 造成的碎片
questions.explanation_zh: 「先缓冲再以 chunk 大小扩展」是让 HDF5 chunk 在磁盘上保持连续的唯一办法。

questions.question: Why is swmr=True opened on the reader side, not on the writer side?
options: Single-Writer-Multiple-Reader mode lets dataloader workers share the file safely; the writer needs no special mode because it writes one shard per process
questions.explanation: Mixing the two modes is the most common cause of 'file is locked' failures.
questions.question_zh: 为什么 swmr=True 是在 reader 端打开,而不是在 writer 端?
options_zh: Single-Writer-Multiple-Reader 模式让 dataloader worker 可以安全地共享文件; writer 不需要特殊模式,因为它每个进程写一个分片
questions.explanation_zh: 把两种模式混在一起是「文件被锁」失败最常见的原因。

questions.question: What does the boundary token id exist to make explicit?
options: Document boundaries within a packed window so the model is not silently trained on cross-document concatenation
questions.explanation: Without an explicit boundary the trainer learns boundaries as noise; with it the boundary becomes a usable separator.
questions.question_zh: boundary token id 用来显式表达什么?
options_zh: 打包窗口里的文档边界,免得模型在跨文档拼接上被静默训练
questions.explanation_zh: 没有显式边界时,trainer 会把边界当作噪声学习; 有了它,边界就是可用的分隔符。
